rationale: The website requires a premium, high-end digital marketing agency feel. By combining Swiss typography principles (clarity, authority, large scale) with Luxury surface treatments (glassmorphism, generous negative space, refined borders), we establish Mayank Bhardwaj as a top-tier consultant for USA/Canada clients, while maintaining the brand colors requested.

primary.description: Main action color for primary CTAs (Book Strategy Call). Trustworthy and energetic blue.

secondary.description: Deep navy/charcoal for bold typography in light mode, and base background in dark mode.

accent.description: Teal for data metrics, highlights, active states, and secondary visual flair. Do not use for primary CTAs.

hierarchy.overline: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-accent font-semibold

layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 md:gap-8
layout_and_spacing.general: Use generous negative space to feel premium. Sections should breathe. Images should not exceed 80vh on mobile.

surface_strategies.glassmorphism_nav: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-gray-950/70 border-b border-gray-200/50 dark:border-gray-800/50
surface_strategies.cards: bg-white dark:bg-gray-900 border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.cards_hover: hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-900/5 dark:hover:shadow-blue-900/20 hover:border-blue-200 dark:hover:border-blue-800

motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) for lists and grids. Duration: 0.5s, ease: easeOut.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change state. Buttons scale down slightly (scale: 0.98) on tap.
motion_and_interactions.smooth_scroll: Implement smooth scrolling for anchor links to enhance the premium feel.

implementation_rules: Use strictly .js extension for React components, no TypeScript.
Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Avoid centering text entirely. Use left-alignment for dense content and cards. Center alignment is only for short section intros.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; apply the defined glassmorphism strategy.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.details: Logo left. Desktop links center. Right: Dark/Light toggle and 'Book Call' CTA. Mobile: Hamburger menu via Shadcn Sheet.

sections.name: Hero
sections.details: Left: Overline 'Digital Marketing Consultant', H1 'Helping Businesses Grow with SEO, AI Search & High-Converting Websites'. Subheading describing traffic and Google Ads. CTAs: Primary Blue 'Book a Free Strategy Call', Outline 'View My Work'. Right: Professional portrait overlapping a subtle gradient blob (Blue/Teal).

sections.name: Services
sections.details: 8 Services (SEO, AI Search Optimization, Google Ads, Web Dev, Web Redesign, Tech SEO, Local SEO, Audits). Cards with top-left icon (lucide-react), H3, and short description. Apply cards_hover strategy.

sections.name: Case Studies
sections.details: 3 Cards highlighting metrics. High contrast typography. Use accent Teal for the large metric numbers (e.g., '+150%'). Add abstract data images at the top of the cards.

sections.name: About
sections.details: Left: Image of modern workspace/meeting. Right: Text detailing 4+ years freelance, based in Delhi, serving USA/Canada, focus on measurable growth.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.details: 6 client testimonials. Minimalist cards with client name, role, and quote. Aesthetically clean.

sections.name: Pricing
sections.details: 4 Tiers: SEO Starter $99/mo, SEO Growth $299/mo (Highlight this one with a subtle Primary border/glow), Web Dev $799, Web Redesign $499. Use Check icons for features.

sections.name: FAQ
sections.details: Shadcn Accordion centered layout. Clean borders.

sections.name: Blog
sections.details: 3 recent articles. Minimalist preview cards with date, title, and 'Read more' link.

sections.name: Contact & CTA Banner
sections.details: CTA Banner: 'Ready to dominate your market?'. Left column: hello@mayankbhardwaj.com, WhatsApp and LinkedIn buttons. Right column: Shadcn Form (Name, Email, Message) with 'Send Message' button.

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Copyright 2026 Mayank Bhardwaj. Subtle gray background.

hero_portrait.description: Professional Indian man leaning against wall, representing Mayank.

case_study_1.description: Abstract futuristic data graph in low light.
